headline: Is Element Solutions (ESI) Below Fair Value On Its $14.5b Takeover Deal?
summary: Solstice Advanced Materials has agreed to acquire Element Solutions (ESI) in a cash and stock deal valued at about $14.5b, including assumed net debt. The transaction is putting fresh focus on the specialty chemicals stock. See our latest analysis for Element Solutions. The takeover news comes after a strong run for Element Solutions, with a year to date share price return of 63.15% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 73.40%. This comes even though the stock has recently given back some...

headline: ESI to Be Acquired by Solstice, Creating Advanced Materials Leader
summary: Element Solutions agrees to be acquired by Solstice in a $14.5B deal, expanding the advanced materials platform across semiconductors, AI and electronics.

headline: Solstice Advanced Materials to acquire specialty chemicals firm for $14.5B
